summary: The planning and architecture contract is implementable and matches the current source topology. Closure orchestration is owned by run-session modules, src/cli.js remains the permitted outer composition root, managed-worktree mutation and independent read-only review authorities fail closed, and the already-merged Production Runtime Connectors and Independent Review Orchestration are composed rather than reimplemented. Exact-head target architecture conformance passes without a new run-session-to-CLI reverse dependency.
inspection_summary: Inspected the exact-head Story, canonical Spec clauses, test plan references, architecture decision, target model, Design SSOT routing, source imports and composition edges, managed-worktree dispatch validation, independent-review isolation, predecessor evidence boundaries, current pr-prepare acceptance mapping, and exact-head conformance. The current repair commit changes only the behavioral E2E traceability surface and does not alter production architecture.

source_checks: src/one-command-pr-ready-closure.js imports only node:timers/promises and accepts readiness, preparation, runtime dispatch, polling, cancellation, and persistence as bounded callbacks.
src/guarded-run-session.js composes createOneCommandPrReadyRunSessionOwners and createGuardedIndependentReviewRunner; no inspected run-session source imports src/cli.js.
runtime dispatch requires request.requirements.managed_worktree to equal the Guarded Run authority root and validates the reported implementation HEAD against the real authoritative worktree HEAD.

implementation requests require workspace_write; review requests require review capability, a read-only sandbox, no workspace_write capability, no changed files, a separate reviewer identity/session, and a closed lifecycle.
the autonomous action registry ends at final_prepare; PR creation, merge, waiver, deployment, publication, and material external side effects remain outside the autonomous plan.
verification: node --test test/e2e/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure-runtime.spec.ts test/scope-boundary-gate.test.js test/e2e/story-vibepro-surface-aware-agent-review-freshness-main.spec.ts (18/18 pass at this exact HEAD)

judgment_delta.initial_concern: The final integration Story could place orchestration policy in the CLI or cause run-session code to call back into the command layer.
judgment_delta.final_judgment: The Architecture and target model assign the owner to run-session. src/one-command-pr-ready-closure.js is callback-injected, guarded-run-session performs composition, reverse-import inspection finds no CLI dependency, and exact-head conformance records new_run_session_cli_reverse_dependency=false.

judgment_delta.initial_concern: One-command implementation could mutate a checkout other than the authoritative managed worktree or accept an unverified runtime HEAD.
judgment_delta.final_judgment: guarded-run-session derives an explicit authority root, rejects dispatches whose managed_worktree differs, resolves git identity before and after execution, and rejects completed implementation results whose reported HEAD differs from the authoritative worktree HEAD.

judgment_delta.initial_concern: The final Story could duplicate the merged PR #377 connector implementation or PR #382 independent-review lifecycle.
judgment_delta.final_judgment: The planning contract explicitly classifies those behaviors as inherited. The source composes createProductionRuntimeConnectors and createGuardedIndependentReviewRunner from their existing modules; provider capability, sandbox, identity, lifecycle, provenance, and verdict validation remain with those owners.

judgment_delta.initial_concern: Autonomous closure could silently cross human authority by creating or merging a PR, waiving a critical gate, or performing an external side effect.
judgment_delta.final_judgment: The Spec invariant and action registry stop at current-HEAD final_prepare/pr_ready. Runtime objectives explicitly prohibit create/merge/waive/deploy/publish behavior, and the behavioral E2E confirms pr_create, merge, and waiver are absent from the autonomous plan.

judgment_delta.initial_concern: The AC traceability-only repair at 926227f9 could mask an architecture regression or rely on circular Story prose.
judgment_delta.final_judgment: The repair changes only the closure runtime E2E, binds AC markers to observed runtime and repository assertions, and leaves production modules unchanged. pr prepare reports 8/8 criteria covered, focused closure/scope/freshness tests pass 18/18, and conformance remains improved from 81 to 80 violations.
